chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.310 of 2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply of advocate as at “A” 2. For orders on M.A. No.7157/2023 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of main case ------------------------------ 23.05.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ----------------------------------------------- This acquittal appeal was filed on 03.06.2023. Record reflects that neither appellant nor his counsel appeared on 19.06.2023 and 08.12.2023. Thereafter, appellant and his counsel have never taken any interest to get the matter fixed before the Court. Today, the position is same, neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance, which reflects that they have lost their interest to pursue the instant criminal acquittal appeal, which is dismissed on account of non- prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
